baseTopic: Exceptional independent ice cream, gelato, frozen custard, soft serve, and frozen dessert shops that can pass Mosaic public-quality validation
description: Small recovery wave after the 300-candidate nationwide map was quality-gated. This wave is intentionally narrow: find entries near Albany and the surrounding Northeast that can be promoted only with exact addresses, current 2023-2026 evidence, and verified real product photos from the actual place.

targets.name: Albany-Verified-Recovery
targets.location: Albany, Delmar, Guilderland, Colonie, Latham, Rensselaer, and Cohoes, New York. Exclude Stewart's Shops, Dairy Queen, Carvel, Cold Stone, Baskin-Robbins, Friendly's, Sonic, McDonald's, Culver's, Shake Shack, and other convenience-store or generic-chain entries. Promote only exact street-address places with current evidence and real product photos.

targets.name: Troy-Schenectady-Verified-Recovery
targets.location: Troy, Watervliet, Green Island, Schenectady, Scotia, Rotterdam, Niskayuna, and surrounding Capital Region towns, New York. Exclude convenience stores and generic chains. Promote only candidates with exact street address, current 2023-2026 operation signal, and verified real product photos.

targets.name: Saratoga-Lake-George-Verified-Recovery
targets.location: Saratoga Springs, Ballston Spa, Clifton Park, Wilton, Glens Falls, Queensbury, and Lake George, New York. Exclude generic chains. Promote only destination-worthy independent frozen dessert places with exact address, current product evidence, and real product photos.

targets.name: Hudson-Valley-Catskills-Verified-Recovery
targets.location: Hudson, Kingston, Rhinebeck, New Paltz, Woodstock, Phoenicia, Catskill, and nearby Hudson Valley or Catskills towns. Exclude generic chains. Promote only exact-address places with recent evidence and verified product photos.

targets.name: Berkshires-Western-Mass-Verified-Recovery
targets.location: Pittsfield, Lenox, Great Barrington, North Adams, Williamstown, Stockbridge, Northampton, Amherst, and nearby Western Massachusetts towns. Exclude generic chains. Promote only exact-address places with current evidence and verified product photos.
